backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Product, Order, and UserProfile types with CRUD operations, access control integration, demo products, and functions for product/order/user management with admin and user permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four high-confidence features related to fixing frontend React Query hooks (useGetAllProducts, useCreateProduct) and ProductFormModal component for proper product fetching, creation, error handling, and cache invalidation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend components and pages, describing routing, state management, UI components, admin dashboard access (now without authentication checks), and page-specific functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like backgrounds, borders, cards, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for StudyNeeds app with meta tags, favicon, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app with TanStack Router setup defining all routes (home, shop, product details, cart, checkout, admin), wrapped with CartProvider and WishlistProvider, including ProfileSetupModal and WhatsAppButton.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderDetai: Placeholder modal dialog for viewing order details. Currently shows a warning message that backend support is required and only provides a close button.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: Admin page for managing orders with search and filter UI. Currently displays a placeholder message indicating backend support is needed, with disabled controls and an empty table.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: Modal form for creating/editing products with fields for name, category, description, price, discount, rating, stock quantity, and image upload. Handles image preview, upload progress, and form validation with mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: Admin page for managing products with search, category filter, and table display. Fetches products using a query hook and provides add, edit, and delete actions (edit/delete currently show toast notifications as placeholders).
frontend/src/components/admin/UserDetail: Placeholder modal dialog for viewing user details. Currently shows a warning message that backend support is required and only provides a close button.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersManag: A placeholder admin component for user management that displays a disabled search interface and empty table with a message indicating backend support is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Protected route component that verifies user authentication and admin status, showing loading states during verification and redirecting unauthorized users with error messages.
frontend/src/components/BannerSlider.tsx: Auto-rotating carousel component displaying 5 promotional banners with manual navigation arrows, dot indicators, and 5-second auto-advance interval.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesMenu.t: Modal overlay component that displays a grid of product categories with icons and links, triggered from the header with a close button.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesSectio: Homepage section component that displays all product categories in a responsive grid with icons and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with four columns (About, Policies, Contact, Newsletter), social media links, newsletter signup form, and copyright information.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main site header with logo, search bar, location selector, cart, authentication button, and mobile menu toggle; includes sticky positioning and Internet Identity integration.
frontend/src/components/LocationSelector: Modal component for selecting delivery location from a grid of Indian cities with visual selection state.
frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx: Slide-in mobile navigation menu with links to Home, Shop, Admin Panel, and authentication controls.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product display card with image, pricing, discount badge, rating, wishlist toggle, and add-to-cart/buy-now buttons.
frontend/src/components/ProductSection.t: Section component that renders a titled grid of up to 8 product cards using ProductCard component.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to complete their profile with name, email, phone, and address fields. Uses a mutation hook to save the caller user profile and displays toast notifications on success or error.
Displays a grid of four service cards (E-Commerce, Home Tuition, Documentation, Career Counselling) with icons, descriptions, and action buttons. Only the E-Commerce service is currently available; others show 'Coming Soon' badges.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Carousel component displaying customer testimonials with ratings, names, and roles. Includes navigation buttons to cycle through four hardcoded testimonials.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that opens WhatsApp chat with a predefined phone number and message.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays five feature cards (Trusted Platform, Affordable Pricing, Local Support, Verified Teachers, Fast Delivery) in a grid layout with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides cart state management with localStorage persistence, supporting add/update/remove operations and calculating total items and prices with discount support.
frontend/src/context/WishlistContext.tsx: Manages wishlist state with localStorage persistence, providing methods to add, remove, check existence, and retrieve product IDs in the wishlist.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality with AuthClient integration and delegation identity management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for product CRUD operations, user profile management, and admin authorization checks using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Simple re-export hook that provides access to the WishlistContext functionality.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes and StudyNeeds brand colors (blue primary and orange accent) using the Poppins font family.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing products, orders, and users. Displays summary cards showing total products, orders (N/A), and users (N/A) with notes that backend support is required for order and user data.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls, remove functionality, and price calculations including delivery charges. Shows empty cart state with a call-to-action to continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with delivery address form and payment method selection (COD/online). Currently displays a warning that order placement functionality is not yet available and requires backend support.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page featuring banner slider, categories section, and multiple product sections (trending, school essentials, budget deals, furniture). Includes services, why choose us, and testimonials sections.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page displaying success message with a checkmark icon, estimated delivery time (3-5 business days), and a button to continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailsPage.ts: Product detail page showing image gallery, product information, pricing with discounts, quantity selector, and add-to-cart/buy-now buttons. Includes related products section and handles loading/not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Shop page component displaying products with category sidebar navigation, sorting options (popularity, price, rating), and product grid using ProductCard components with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for parameters like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including Poppins font, OKLCH color system with design tokens, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining StudyNeeds as a multi-service student platform with e-commerce, tuition marketplace, and documentation services; documents known issues with admin panel product saving and backend API connection problems.
